content.markdown:
# Maintenance state

Maintenance states inform users that part of the platform is temporarily unavailable due to planned or unplanned work.

***

## When to use

* When a page or feature is temporarily unavailable due to maintenance.

## Style

* Explain what is affected and for how long.

* Provide an estimated time to resolution when available.

* Include a single CTA if there is something the user can do.

## Do / Don't

| Do                                                                                 | Don't               |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------- |
| Scheduled maintenance in progress / Reports may be unavailable until 12:00 PM EST. | System unavailable. |
| We're making improvements. / Check back in a few minutes.                          | Under construction. |

## Examples

| Element | Example text                                   |
| ------- | ---------------------------------------------- |
| Title   | Scheduled maintenance in progress              |
| Body    | Reports may be unavailable until 12:00 PM EST. |
| CTA     | Refresh                                        |

content.prose: Maintenance states inform users that part of the platform is temporarily unavailable due to planned or unplanned work.

bullets: When a page or feature is temporarily unavailable due to maintenance.
Explain what is affected and for how long.
Provide an estimated time to resolution when available.
Include a single CTA if there is something the user can do.

content.do: Scheduled maintenance in progress / Reports may be unavailable until 12:00 PM EST.
We're making improvements. / Check back in a few minutes.

rows: Reports may be unavailable until 12:00 PM EST.

content.prose: System states communicate the current condition of the platform or a specific view. Clear, direct copy helps users understand what happened and what to do next.
